name: payql
description: Get live on-chain data from The Graph's subgraphs and pay per query in USDC over x402 — gasless, keyless, bring-your-own-wallet. Discover the right live subgraph (ranked by curation signal), see the ~$0.01 price before paying, then pull DeFi, DEX, NFT, ENS, token, and governance data in one agent loop. No API key, no account, no ETH for gas.
author: paulieb14
